problem: Cardiac conditions like atrial fibrillation often go undetected during routine ECG examinations. Cardiologists need advanced ECG technology that can identify hidden cardiac risks from standard resting ECG recordings, along with integrated monitoring and rehabilitation solutions.
solution: Fukuda Denshi develops AI-powered 12-lead ECG systems (FCP-9900ai) that can estimate hidden atrial fibrillation risk from sinus rhythm ECGs. Their integrated monitor management system (CVW-8000SCR) provides comprehensive cardiac monitoring. The company also offers cardiac rehabilitation programs, AED solutions, home medical care systems, and pacemaker management tools, creating a complete cardiac care ecosystem from diagnosis to rehabilitation.
